digitalWorkforceRecruitmentEngine.title: Digitalt rekrutteringssenter
digitalWorkforceRecruitmentEngine.subtitle: Arbeidsstyrkeplanlegging, rekruttering, ansettelsesforespørsler, provisjonering og kapasitetsprognoser — ansett digitale ansatte etter rolle, ikke modell.
digitalWorkforceRecruitmentEngine.accessRequiredBody: Digital Workforce Recruitment krever Business- eller Enterprise-plan. Kontakt administrator hvis tilgang er blokkert.
digitalWorkforceRecruitmentEngine.noHiringRequests: Ingen ansettelsesforespørsler — send din første forespørsel nedenfor.

digitalWorkforceValueEngine.title: Digitalt verdisenter
digitalWorkforceValueEngine.subtitle: ROI, produktivitetseffekt, kostnadsallokering, besparelsesanalyse og arbeidsstyrkeøkonomi — mål forretningsverdien av den digitale arbeidsstyrken.
digitalWorkforceValueEngine.accessRequiredBody: Digital Workforce Value krever Business- eller Enterprise-plan. Kontakt administrator hvis tilgang er blokkert.
digitalWorkforceValueEngine.noScorecards: Ingen scorekort — provisjoner digitale ansatte for å starte verdisporing.
digitalWorkforceValueEngine.noRoiAnalyses: Ingen ROI-analyser ennå — generer din første analyse nedenfor.

digitalWorkforceGovernanceEngine.title: Digitalt styringssenter
digitalWorkforceGovernanceEngine.subtitle: Beslutningsmyndighet, godkjenningspolicyer, risikoklassifisering, etiske retningslinjer og ansvarlighet for den digitale arbeidsstyrken.
digitalWorkforceGovernanceEngine.accessRequiredBody: Digital Workforce Governance krever Business- eller Enterprise-plan. Kontakt administrator hvis tilgang er blokkert.
digitalWorkforceGovernanceEngine.noAssignments: Ingen myndighetstildelinger — provisjoner digitale ansatte for å starte styring.

aipifyEmployeeRecognitionCelebrationEngi.title: Recognition & Celebration
aipifyEmployeeRecognitionCelebrationEngi.subtitle: Guided Adoption Era (239–243). Recognition Companion supports peer and executive recognition, milestone celebrations, recognition feed, analytics, and celebration reminders. Supports positive culture — does NOT bypass recognition RBAC. Growth Partner — never Affiliate.
aipifyEmployeeRecognitionCelebrationEngi.humanOversightRequired: Human oversight required — users retain recognition judgment control; Recognition Companion supports only
aipifyEmployeeRecognitionCelebrationEngi.eraOpenerNote: Cross-link only — do not duplicate Notification Engine, Calendar Assistant, Employee Growth, Learning Center, Analytics Engine, or Aipify Translate RPCs.
aipifyEmployeeRecognitionCelebrationEngi.companionLabel: Recognition Companion — supports recognition clarity, never replaces human recognition judgment
aipifyEmployeeRecognitionCelebrationEngi.crossLinks: Related surfaces — cross-link only, do not duplicate
aipifyEmployeeRecognitionCelebrationEngi.companionLimitations: Recognition Companion limitations — does NOT bypass recognition RBAC, expose recognition without authorization, or ignore personal celebration preferences

phase242.mission: Recognition Companion supports recognition celebration — users retain recognition judgment control and celebration preferences stay protected.
phase242.philosophy: People First. RBAC-protected recognition celebration scaffolds. Growth Partner terminology — never Affiliate.
phase242.growthEra: Guided Adoption Era (239–243) — Phase 242 continues the era.
